ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO ROBERT TAYAC SET FOR DEC-11-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.. NOV-17-2003 NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ROBERT TAYAC, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-15-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-30-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JANET POND. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO ROBERT TAYAC SET FOR JAN-15-2004 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE 11-17-03 PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JAN-15-2004 MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHANAYEM, ISAM LOLAS, MANOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAI, LAU CHI LAU, SELINA YIM PLAINTIFF ISAM GHANAYEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS LAU CHI WAI AND SELINA YIM LAU THE SUM OF $3,320.00. PLAINTIFF MANOR LOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS LAU CHI WAI AND SELINA YIM LAU THE SUM OF $3,000.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ARBITRATOR PHILIP SOCHAT KEITH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-03-2003 THROUGH FEB-01-2004.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 AGAINST ROBERT TAYAC, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-11-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-29-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
